zh.Morgannwg Gwlad, Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根
zh.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey於0870年出生在威爾士安格萊時，她的父親King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons51歲，母親Angharad ferch Meurig46歲。她於0890年之前與Owain ap Hywel of Powys結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於0930年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.Morgannwg Gwlad, Glamorgan, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根
zh-hans.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey于0870年出生在威尔士安格萊时，她的父亲King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons51岁，母亲Angharad ferch Meurig46岁。她于0890年之前与Owain ap Hywel of Powys结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于0930年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey was born in 0870, in Anglesey, Wales, her father, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, was 51 and her mother, Angharad ferch Meurig, was 46. She married Owain ap Hywel of Powys before 0890. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 0930, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey est née en 0870, à Anglesey, Galles, son père, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Meurig, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Owain ap Hywel of Powys avant 0890. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 0930, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey 0870 in Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons 51 und ihre Mutter Angharad ferch Meurig 46. Sie hat vor 0890 Owain ap Hywel of Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 0930 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey è nata il nel 0870 nel Anglesey, Galles, sua padre, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Angharad ferch Meurig, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Owain ap Hywel of Powys prima del 0890. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 0930, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nest ferch Rhodri of Angleseyが0870年にウェールズアングレセイで生まれた時，父King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britonsは51歳，母Angharad ferch Meurigは46歳であった。0890年以前にOwain ap Hywel of Powysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は0930年にフランスピカーディソンメで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey(이)가 0870년 웨일스 앤글레시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad ferch Meurig(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 0890년 이전 Owain ap Hywel of Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 0930년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey nasceu em 0870, em Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Meurig, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Owain ap Hywel of Powys antes 0890. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 0930, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey родилась в 0870 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, её отцу по имени King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Meurig, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Owain ap Hywel of Powys перед 0890 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 0930 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey nació en 0870, en Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Meurig, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Owain ap Hywel of Powys antes de 0890. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 0930, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
